title: Water Worlds are orbital-only for construction
claim_text: Water Worlds in the current repository evidence should be treated as having no surface construction slots

title: Station economy is inherited
claim_text: Colony station economy should not be treated as a direct player-selectable value

title: One weak Refinery link was insufficient in the tested Wregoe case
claim_text: A single weak Refinery link did not restore Steel Titanium or Aluminium in the documented Dodec case

title: A4 post-build facility set included two High Tech Hubs
claim_text: The Rocha Liberty evidence set shows A4 after the intended High Tech support build completed

title: Rocha Liberty showed strong High Tech and Industrial support after build
claim_text: Rocha Liberty displayed strong Industrial x2 and High Tech x2 links plus multiple weak links in the post-build state

title: Rocha Liberty exposed mixed economies after build
claim_text: Rocha Liberty advertised Industrial High Tech Extraction Military and Refinery in the post-build state

title: Rocha Liberty showed multiple High Tech-style commodities after build
claim_text: Post-build evidence showed Computer Components Auto-Fabricators Robotics Micro Controllers and Advanced Catalysers among visible commodities

title: Raven projected deficits and placeholder plans were visible
claim_text: Raven planning screenshots showed unmet build-point needs and placeholder-style planned or unbuilt facilities

title: Apollo and Artemis Orbis previews looked mechanically identical on shown bars
claim_text: No visible colony-effect bar differences were observed between Apollo and Artemis Orbis layout previews

title: No reliable station-class superiority was shown in the preview evidence
claim_text: The available Orbis Ocellus and Dodec previews did not demonstrate clear mechanical superiority on the shown bars

title: A4 High Tech promotion is expected to broaden total material coverage
claim_text: The current A4 experiment predicts that raising High Tech to second place may improve whole-colony construction-material coverage

title: Absent primary artifacts are only indirectly represented
claim_text: The repository does not yet contain the underlying Mega Guide spreadsheet and flowchart artifacts and therefore cannot claim direct page-level extraction from them
